productDisplayName: Nike Men Classic Fresher Off White Track Pants
description: CompositionOff-white track pants for men made of 100% polyester, that has a wide elasticated waist band with a drawstring, mesh panel on the inside, black panel detailing on the sides, two insert pockets on the sides and the hem has a zipper and an elasticated toggle strap to adjust the FitFitRegularWash careWash separately with like coloursDo not bleachCool ironGet more out of your workouts and yoga sessions with this flattering pair of tracks from nike. The shape will flatter most body types while the mesh panels wick sweat away from the body and keep you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team them with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym.
